22774: Had 3 shots, 0 on target, and spent most of the match pointing at his teammate's shoes in disbelief. Frustrating day for CR7.
45843: Bagged a hat-trick and had the Algerian defense running around like headless chickens. Normal service resumed for the GOAT.
48128: Got sent off within forty minutes for swearing at the referee. A masterclass in self-destruction that derailed Turkey's blueprint.
76762: Stuck in midfield sideways-passing everyone to sleep. Even the coffee machine was struggling to stay awake.
84774: Manuel Neuer only had one save to make, probably spent most of the match putting his feet up. Must be nice, eh?
104943: Commanded the left wing but looked like he was running through wet porridge in the second half. Classic Robertson.
120829: Nathaniel Brown managed a shot, so at least he was trying to get involved. Small mercies, I suppose.
127444: Eloy Room, take a bow! 15 saves, a proper brick wall between the sticks for Curaçao. Man of the match, no question!
133993: Kristoffer Nordfeldt made two saves, but still shipped five goals. Not exactly a heroic performance, was it?
138664: Leandro Bacuna had two shots, but couldn't convert. And a yellow card to boot! A truly memorable day for all the wrong reasons.
157892: Virgil van Dijk was clearly enjoying the show from the back, not needing to do much with Sweden's attack being so toothless.
167213: Jürgen Locadia had a shot but couldn't make it count, then got subbed off with an injury. A day to forget for him, I reckon.
171771: Enner Valencia had seven shots and zero goals. He must've been aiming for the corner flag, not the net! A proper shocker in front of goal.
178433: Joshua Brenet had a quiet one, clearly just enjoying the scenery rather than getting stuck in.
188052: Jonathan Tah had a solid, if unspectacular, outing. Just doing his job, nothing to write home about.
190161: Joshua Kimmich kept things ticking over, but didn't light up the stat sheet. A professional, if understated, performance.
194711: Franck Kessie bagged a goal for Côte d'Ivoire, showing Germany how it's done, at least for a while!
202641: Leroy Sané was subbed off after a rather anonymous performance. Clearly not his day to shine, was it?
204679: Victor Lindelöf had a front-row seat to the Dutch masterclass, probably wishing he'd called in sick.
207921: Hernán Galíndez made three saves, which is decent, but still couldn't inspire his side to score at the other end.
213248: Denzel Dumfries was a menace down the flank, bagging two assists for the Netherlands. What a delivery man!
213718: Ibrahim Sangaré was subbed off, didn't really leave his mark on the game. A bit of a passenger, perhaps?
214689: Pervis Estupiñán was subbed off, didn't register any stats. Probably just a casual kickabout for him, eh?
216287: Juninho Bacuna had three shots and a yellow card. A busy boy, but not in the way his manager would have wanted!
219022: Frenkie de Jong was subbed off after a quiet shift where he managed to avoid any meaningful stats. Probably saving himself for the post-match buffet!
224786: Sherel Floranus had a shot, which is more than some, but then got injured. A mixed bag of a day, then.
231182: Kai Havertz had three shots but couldn't find the net. Clearly left his scoring boots in the dressing room today.
235662: Alexander Isak grabbed an assist for Sweden's consolation goal. At least someone was trying to make things happen!
237055: Jesper Karlström had a shot, but was subbed off early. A brief cameo, nothing more.
245918: Armando Obispo had a quiet day at the back, probably just happy to get out of there with a clean sheet.
246281: Juriën Gaari picked up a yellow card, clearly getting stuck in. A bit too much, perhaps?
249524: Cody Gakpo was absolutely on fire, bagging two goals and an assist for the Netherlands! A proper star turn!
250166: Gabriel Gudmundsson got himself a yellow card and then was subbed off. Not exactly a stellar performance, was it?
250888: Ghislain Konan had a shot, but that was about it. A rather forgettable performance.
258906: Viktor Gyökeres had five shots but couldn't score. Must've been aiming for the stands, bless him!
259481: Donyell Malen was subbed off at halftime, clearly not making the desired impact. Early bath for him!
261328: Tijjani Reijnders had a shot before being subbed off. At least he tried, eh?
261595: Yahia Fofana made five saves for Côte d'Ivoire, doing his best to keep Germany out. A decent shift, despite the result.
262111: Alan Franco was subbed off, didn't register any stats. Just a bit of a run-out, then.
265926: John Yeboah had three shots but couldn't score. All that effort for nothing, eh?
270829: Jordy Alcívar picked up a yellow card and was subbed off at halftime. A proper clumsy performance, that.
274522: Benjamin Nygren had a shot but was subbed off. A brief moment of ambition, quickly extinguished.
274632: Ryan Gravenberch had a shot, so he was at least trying to get in on the action.
276218: Tahith Chong was subbed off, didn't register any stats. Probably just there for the cardio.
277352: Gonzalo Plata had five shots but couldn't find the net. All that huffing and puffing for zero reward!
281122: Felix Nmecha came on and immediately got an assist for Germany's winner. What an impact! Proper game-changer.
282229: Brian Brobbey was clinical, bagging two goals from two shots for the Netherlands. A proper striker's performance!
282583: Jan Paul van Hecke was an unused substitute, probably had the best seat in the house for the Dutch demolition.
284822: Odilon Kossounou had a quiet game, just doing his defensive duties without much fuss.
286569: Wilfried Singo had a shot, but then got injured and subbed off. A bit of a nightmare, really.
286828: Nico Schlotterbeck was subbed off early due to injury. A short and not-so-sweet appearance for him.
287005: Willian Pacho had a shot, so he was at least trying to contribute to Ecuador's goal drought.
289877: Moisés Caicedo had a shot, but couldn't break the deadlock. A frustrating day for him.
291609: Bart Verbruggen made seven saves, but still conceded one. A busy boy, but couldn't keep a clean sheet.
291630: Amad Diallo had a shot, but was subbed off. A fleeting moment of involvement, then back to the bench.
292062: Piero Hincapié had two shots, but couldn't find the net. Clearly not his day for goalscoring glory.
296512: Micky van de Ven was an unused substitute. Probably just there to make up the numbers, eh?
297150: Pedro Vite had two shots, but couldn't convert. All that effort, and still no cigar!
301370: Alexander Bernhardsson was subbed off, didn't register any stats. A rather forgettable outing for him.
303748: Florian Wirtz had two shots but couldn't score. A bit wasteful in front of goal today.
303821: Jamal Musiala had two shots but was subbed off without scoring. Not his most impactful performance.
304242: Yasin Ayari had five shots and a yellow card. Plenty of effort, but no end product and a booking to boot!
308449: Emmanuel Agbadou had a quiet game, just doing his defensive duties without much fuss.
309185: Ange-Yoan Bonny had a shot but was subbed off. A brief moment of hope, then back to the bench.
312862: Isak Hien had a quiet day at the back, probably just trying to keep the score down.
317285: Livano Comenencia had three shots and a yellow card. A bit of a mixed bag, that.
324930: Gustaf Lagerbielke had a shot, but also watched five goals fly past his defence. Not ideal, is it?
335203: Deveron Fonville was subbed off, didn't register any stats. Just a quick run-out, then.
359370: Aleksandar Pavlovic was subbed off, didn't register any stats. Probably just there for the experience.
386989: Christ Inao Oulaï had a shot, so at least he was trying to make something happen.
402479: Yan Diomande had a shot but was subbed off. A fleeting moment of involvement, then back to the bench.
